title: Zotero 9 MenuManager-only migration
goal: Replace ztoolkit.Menu/LocalMenuRegistrar with Zotero.MenuManager.registerMenu(). Use context objects (ctx.items, ctx.collectionTreeRow), FTL .label attributes, prefixed l10nIDs, three-level visibility (sync/cache/async), unregisterMenu() in onShutdown.
in_scope: Rewrite menus.ts to MenuManager-only (delete ztoolkit.Menu/LocalMenuRegistrar usage)
Delete src/utils/menu.ts; update src/utils/ztoolkit.ts to remove LocalMenuRegistrar import and Menu field
Context-based callbacks: item menu uses ctx.items, collection menu uses ctx.collectionTreeRow
Fix toggleNonDuplicates(): add optional libraryID param; MenuManager callers pass ctx.items[0].libraryID; number[] resolved via Zotero.Items.get()
FTL .label attributes on menu keys, addon-name key added
Add insertFTLIfNeeded for addon.ftl in onMainWindowLoad (preserving existing itemSection.ftl)
Three-level visibility with cache invalidation: sync prereq, cache-based submenu enabled/disabled, child items cached+async; cache cleared after mark/unmark, duplicate refresh, notifier events
Save registeredIDs, call unregisterMenu() in hooks.ts onShutdown (M006 migrates to DisposerRegistry)
acceptance: src/utils/menu.ts deleted; ztoolkit.ts has no LocalMenuRegistrar/Menu references
Menu registration at startup level (not per-window)
Item menu callbacks use ctx.items; collection menu callbacks use ctx.collectionTreeRow?.isDuplicates()
Context-driven menu commands do not depend on active pane for items/libraryID when items provided
FTL keys have .label attributes; addon-name key in all locales
registerMenus() returns IDs; hooks.ts calls unregisterMenu() in onShutdown
Cache miss shows disabled (not empty) submenu; cache invalidated after mark/unmark

MANUAL: menus render with correct labels; mark then re-right-click shows unmark; unmark then re-right-click shows mark; cache warm + unrelated items hides submenu; disable/re-enable leaves no duplicate menus
